summary: Frontend testing of 3D Minecraft-style browser game (Crafty). Verified UI panels (E, M, C, B, ESC keys), spell casting (F key), mob spawning with variety, and continuous spawning. Found one bug: number keys (1-4) don't properly change spell type due to React closure issue.

ui_bugs.issue: Number keys (1-4) don't change spell type - always casts fireball. React closure stale state issue in handleKeyDown function.

mob_variety.details: Console confirms '✅ Spawned 20 initial mobs with variety'. MOB_TYPES config includes pig (pink), cow (brown), zombie (green), skeleton (beige), spider (black) at SimplifiedNPCSystem.js lines 5-57.

mob_movement.details: Mob movement AI implemented at SimplifiedNPCSystem.js lines 319-378. Mobs have moveTimer, targetX/Z, isMoving state. Movement uses getMobGroundLevel for terrain following.

e_key_inventory.details: E key opens Inventory panel with block selection grid. Panel shows '📦 Inventory' title and displays all block types with quantities.

m_key_magic.details: M key opens Magic panel with spell descriptions. Shows all 4 spells: Fireball (50 dmg), Iceball (40 dmg), Lightning (75 dmg), Arcane (60 dmg) with descriptions.

c_key_crafting.details: C key opens Crafting panel with recipes. Shows '🔨 Crafting Table' with Stone Pickaxe, Torch, and Glass recipes.

b_key_building.details: B key opens Building Tools panel. Shows '🏠 Building Tools' with Single Block, Wall Builder, Floor Builder, Delete Tool options.

esc_key_settings.details: ESC key opens Settings panel with Resume button. Shows '⚙️ Settings' with Show Stats toggle, Game Mode toggle, Time toggle, and Resume Game button.

f_key_spell_casting.details: F key casts spell projectile. Console shows '🔮 Casting spell: fireball' and '🔥 ENHANCED: Cast fireball! Damage: 50'. EnhancedMagicSystem.js handles projectile creation and rendering.

spell_selection_number_keys.details: Number keys 1-4 should change spell type but don't work due to React closure issue. Pressing Digit2 then F still casts fireball instead of iceball. Bug in Components.js lines 459-502.

mob_health_bars.details: Health bars implemented at SimplifiedNPCSystem.js lines 133-149. HealthBar component renders above mobs with green/yellow/red color based on health percentage.

damage_numbers.details: Floating damage numbers implemented at SimplifiedNPCSystem.js lines 152-183. DamageNumber component shows damage value floating up and fading out.

continuous_mob_spawning.details: Console shows '🐷 Spawned 1 mobs in chunk 0_0' - continuous spawning as player explores. Implemented at SimplifiedNPCSystem.js lines 262-316.

controls_help_panel.details: Controls help panel visible in top-right corner showing: Click or F - Attack/Cast Spell, E - Inventory, M - Magic, C - Crafting, B - Building, ESC - Settings.

action_items: FIX: Number keys (1-4) spell selection - use useRef instead of useState for selectedSpell to avoid closure stale state issue in handleKeyDown
critical_code_review_comments: React closure issue in Player component: selectedSpell state is captured in handleKeyDown closure. When Digit2 is pressed, setSelectedSpell('iceball') is called but the F key handler still uses the old 'fireball' value. Fix: use useRef to track current spell.
Code quality is good overall - mob system has proper variety, movement AI, health bars, damage numbers, and continuous spawning all implemented correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All major features working: mob variety (5 types), mob movement AI, UI panels (E/M/C/B/ESC), F key spell casting, health bars, damage numbers, continuous spawning. One bug: number keys 1-4 don't change spell type due to React closure issue in Components.js Player component. Fix requires using useRef for selectedSpell tracking.
